output_lean:
theorem group_of_order_5_is_abelian (G : Type*) [Group G] (h : Nat.card G = 5) : 
  IsMulCommutative G := by
  haveI : Fact (5 : ℕ).Prime := ⟨prime_five⟩
  haveI : IsCyclic G := isCyclic_of_prime_card h
  haveI : CommGroup G := IsCyclic.commGroup
  exact IsMulCommutative.of_comm mul_comm := sorry
